---
title: "Contact"
---

**Email:** [steffen.castle@dfki.de](mailto:steffen.castle@dfki.de)

**GitHub:** [github.com/steffencastle](https://github.com/steffencastle)  
**LinkedIn:** [Steffen Castle](https://www.linkedin.com/in/steffen-castle-430ba558/)  
**Google Scholar:** [Profile](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=mQThBMEAAAAJ&hl=en)

I am open to collaborations on grounded language models, mechanistic interpretability, explainability, and AI-for-science workflows.
